plugins.name: buddy-reroll
plugins.description: Reroll your Claude Code /buddy companion. Gacha simulator with daily 3-roll limit, SALT patcher for native binary and npm installs, cross-platform swap (cmd/pwsh/bash), persistent star cache, /buddy-doctor diagnostics. 18 species, 5 rarities, ASCII sprites, Speaki voice.
